ticket_welcome.title: <a:EstrelaDanante:1527368236759388324> **Buy skins and loot quickly and easily!**
ticket_welcome.description:
Welcome to **Kitsune Store**!
<a:Yellow_arrow:1528201664652251187> At our store, we offer several options for you to purchase skins and loot easily and reliably. Check out our options
<a:Yellow_arrow:1528201664652251187> (The menu will only appear for you!)

store_authentication.title: <a:carregando:1529363904445026334> Authentication
store_authentication.description: <a:whitearrow:1346152146814636032> Please select your **League of Legends** region below to start your purchase:

store_sales_center.title: <a:planeta:1527672012825301054> League of Legends Shop
store_sales_center.description: <a:whitearrow:1346152146814636032> Please select the **category** of the product you wish to purchase below:

ticket_order_received.title: <a:planeta:1527672012825301054> Order Received
ticket_order_received.description:
<a:whitearrow:1346152146814636032> Please wait a moment. Our team will assist you shortly so you can proceed with your purchase.
<a:whitearrow:1346152146814636032> {staffRoles}

ticket_payment_methods.title: <:dinheiro:1527368514057408713> Formas de Pagamento | Payment Methods
ticket_payment_methods.description:
<a:whitearrow:1346152146814636032> Por favor, escolha e utilize a sua forma de pagamento preferida abaixo:

💶 **MBWay / PIX / PayPal / Revolut / Crypto**
> Mande uma mensagem neste canal para a equipe de suporte fornecer a chave de pagamento atualizada para o seu pedido!

admin_panel.description:
# ⚙️ Admin Control Panel\nUse the slash commands (/) to manage the server.

Examples: `/lock`, `/slowmode`, `/limpar`.

support_panel.description: # {fox} Kitsune Store | Support Panel\nWelcome to the support panel. Choose an action to perform.
